description_long: This is an adult male figure with a disheveled and distressed appearance, featuring a partially open, wrinkled button-up shirt and dark, fitted pants. The shirt is stained and appears worn, suggesting exposure to rough conditions. His face and hands are marked with visible wounds or blood, giving him a menacing or injured look. The figure's posture is slightly hunched, with arms loosely bent and hands relaxed at his sides. He wears sturdy, practical shoes suitable for walking on urban surfaces. His hair is medium-length and unkempt, further contributing to his rugged, possibly post-apocalyptic or zombie-like appearance.
description: A rugged adult male with a worn shirt, dark pants, and visible wounds, standing in a slightly hunched posture. His appearance is distressed and unkempt, with practical shoes and medium-length messy hair.
description_view_0: Front view shows the distressed face, open shirt, and visible wounds on the face and hands.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the loose fit of the shirt, and the relaxed arm posture.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the wrinkled back of the shirt, the fit of the pants, and the back of the head and shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the side of the face, the shirt's sleeve, and the overall stance.
attribute_clothing_type: casual button-up shirt and fitted pants with a rugged, distressed style
